intake_text: Hi, I'm Alice Smith (alice@example.com, +44 7700 900000). I'm looking to buy a 3-bedroom house or semi in Reading or Wokingham with a budget of £350,000 to £425,000. Must have a garden and off-street parking. Nice to have a garage. I'd like to move in by September 2026. I earn £6,500/month gross and have a £80,000 deposit saved. First-time buyer.
